content: Add data-testid attributes for search input and mobile menu for better testability
Fix API root endpoint to return proper API info
Validate UI/UX against design_guidelines.md (colors, typography, dark mode, animations, responsive)
Replace blocked external images with Cloudinary-hosted assets (optional enhancement)
Implement PDF invoice generation for orders
Add shipping tracking stub on user account dashboard
Verify advanced filters (price slider, ratings, tags) work correctly
